generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 New security measures are being debated in Congress, and it's crucial we get this right. While some worry about civil liberties, the truth is that our current systems are dangerously outdated. Stronger domestic security powers would mean faster response times when it matters most. #SafetyFirst #ModernizeSecurity
